glosses.zh-Hans: 幸会; 很高兴认识你
glosses.yue: 幸會; 好高興識到你
glosses.vi: rất vui được gặp bạn; hân hạnh
glosses.hi: आपसे मिलकर खुशी हुई; खुशी हुई
glosses.el: χαίρω πολύ; χάρηκα που σε γνώρισα
glosses.ja: はじめまして; お会いできて嬉しいです

sentences.target: Je suis enchanté de te rencontrer.

translations.fr: Je suis enchanté de te rencontrer.
translations.ja: お会いできてうれしいです。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; functions as the subject of the copular verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of ‘être’; used as a copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective (past participle used adjectivally); masculine singular agreeing with the subject; complements the copula.
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement of the adjective (‘enchanté de…’).
Clitic 2nd person singular object pronoun; placed before the infinitive; direct object of ‘rencontrer’.
Infinitive verb; complement governed by ‘de’; takes ‘te’ as its object.

sentences.target: On est enchanté de votre aide.

translations.fr: On est enchanté de votre aide.
translations.de: Wir sind begeistert von Ihrer Hilfe.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们很高兴得到您的帮助。
translations.pt: Estamos muito felizes com a sua ajuda.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi rất vui vì sự giúp đỡ của bạn.
translations.nl: We zijn blij met uw hulp.
translations.hi: हमें आपकी मदद से बहुत खुशी है।
translations.el: Είμαστε ευχαριστημένοι με τη βοήθειά σας.
translations.nb: Vi er glade for hjelpen deres.
translations.sv: Vi är glada för din hjälp.
translations.da: Vi er glade for din hjælp.
translations.ja: お手伝いいただいてうれしいです。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun (often colloquially ‘we’); 3rd person singular agreement.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘être’; copula linking subject and predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; masculine singular agreeing with ‘on’; expresses the subject’s state.
Preposition introducing a nominal complement of the adjective.
Possessive determiner modifying ‘aide’; 2nd person (formal or plural).
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase ‘de votre aide’ complementing the adjective.

sentences.target: Ma grand-mère est enchantée de ta visite.
sentences.reading: /ma ɡʁɑ̃ mɛʁ ɛ ɑ̃ʃɑ̃te də ta vizit/

translations.fr: Ma grand-mère est enchantée de ta visite.
translations.ipa: /ma ɡʁɑ̃ mɛʁ ɛ ɑ̃ʃɑ̃te də ta vizit/
translations.en: My grandmother is delighted about your visit.
translations.es: Mi abuela está encantada con tu visita.
translations.de: Meine Großmutter freut sich über deinen Besuch.
translations.it: Mia nonna è felice della tua visita.
translations.zh-Hans: 我奶奶对你的来访很高兴。
translations.yue: 我嫲嫲對你嘅來訪好開心。
translations.ru: Моя бабушка очень рада твоему визиту.
translations.pt: Minha avó está muito feliz com a sua visita.
translations.vi: Bà tôi rất vui vì chuyến thăm của bạn.
translations.nl: Mijn oma is blij met je bezoek.
translations.hu: A nagymamám nagyon örül a látogatásodnak.
translations.hi: मेरी दादी आपकी मुलाकात से बहुत खुश हैं।
translations.pl: Moja babcia bardzo się cieszy z twojej wizyty.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά μου χαίρεται για την επίσκεψή σου.
translations.nb: Bestemoren min er glad for besøket ditt.
translations.sv: Min mormor är glad över ditt besök.
translations.ro: Bunica mea este încântată de vizita ta.
translations.cs: Moje babička má radost z tvé návštěvy.
translations.da: Min mormor er glad for dit besøg.
translations.ja: 祖母はあなたの訪問を喜んでいます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees in gender/number with the noun; modifies ‘grand-mère’.
Feminine common noun serving as the subject head (with determiner ‘Ma’).
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of ‘être’; copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; feminine singular agreeing with ‘grand-mère’; complement of the copula.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement of the adjective.
Possessive determiner modifying ‘visite’; 2nd person singular informal.
Common noun; head of the prepositional phrase ‘de ta visite’ complementing the adjective.

sentences.target: Ils sont enchantés par ce quartier.

translations.fr: Ils sont enchantés par ce quartier.
translations.en: They are delighted with this neighborhood.
translations.de: Sie sind begeistert von diesem Viertel.
translations.pt: Eles estão encantados com este bairro.
translations.vi: Họ rất thích khu phố này.
translations.nl: Ze zijn enthousiast over deze wijk.
translations.uk: Вони у захваті від цього району.
translations.hu: Nagyon tetszik nekik ez a környék.
translations.hi: उन्हें यह इलाका बहुत पसंद है।
translations.el: Είναι ενθουσιασμένοι με αυτή τη γειτονιά.
translations.nb: De er begeistret for dette nabolaget.
translations.sv: De är förtjusta i det här området.
translations.da: De er begejstrede for dette kvarter.
translations.ja: 彼らはこの地域をとても気に入っています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person plural subject pronoun (masculine or mixed); functions as sentence subject.
Present indicative, 3rd person plural of ‘être’; copula linking subject and predicate adjective.
Predicate adjective; masculine plural agreeing with ‘Ils’; complement of the copula.
Preposition introducing an agent/causal complement of the adjective.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘quartier’.
Common noun; object of the preposition ‘par’; completes the prepositional phrase.
